name: New Inquiry
subject: Thank You for Your Inquiry – {{ company_name }}
required_fields: company_name, company_website, customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email, service_name, service_location, preferred_date, preferred_time
body:
Thank You for Your Inquiry

We've received your request and will get in touch shortly

Hello {{ customer_name }},

Thank you for your interest in {{ company_name }}. We’ve received your inquiry and our team will contact you soon.

Your Submitted Details:

Name: {{ customer_name }}
Phone: {{ customer_phone }}
Email: {{ customer_email }}
Requested Services: {{ service_name }}
Preferred Date: {{ preferred_date }}
Preferred Time: {{ preferred_time }}
Service Location: {{ service_location }}

If you have any questions or additional information, feel free to reply to this email or contact us directly.

Best regards,
{{ company_name }}
{{ company_website }}

name: Quotation Created
subject: Your Quotation Has Been Created – {{ company_name }}
required_fields: customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email, quotation_id, quotation_amount, quotation_valid_until, company_name, company_website, preferred_date, preferred_time, service_name, service_location
body:
Hello {{ customer_name }},

Thank you for your interest! Your quotation has been created successfully.

Quotation Summary:

Quotation ID: {{ quotation_id }}
Services: {{ service_name }}
Service Location: {{ service_location }}
Preferred Date: {{ preferred_date }}
Preferred Time: {{ preferred_time }}
Amount: {{ quotation_amount }}
Valid Until: {{ quotation_valid_until }}

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please don’t hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for choosing {{ company_name }}. We look forward to serving you!

Best regards,
{{ company_name }}
{{ company_website }}

body:
Quotation Confirmed

Thank you for trusting {{ company_name }}

Hello {{ customer_name }},

Best regards,
{{ company_name }}
{{ company_website }}

{{ cancellation_reason }}

name: Payment Confirmation

name: Subscription Confirmation
subject: Welcome Aboard, {{ customer_name }} – Your Subscription is Active!
required_fields: customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email, plan_name, start_date, next_billing_date, price, billing_cycle, payment_method, company_name, company_website
body:
Subscription Confirmed

You're now subscribed to our services

Hello {{ customer_name }},

Thank you for subscribing to {{ company_name }}! Your subscription has been successfully activated.

Subscription Details:

Plan Name: {{ plan_name }}
Start Date: {{ start_date }}
Next Billing Date: {{ next_billing_date }}
Amount: {{ price }} / {{ billing_cycle }}
Payment Method: {{ payment_method }}

You can manage your subscription anytime from your dashboard. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us.

Best regards,
{{ company_name }}
{{ company_website }}

name: Subscription Auto Renew
subject: Subscription Renewal Reminder – {{ subscription_name }}
body:
Hello {{ customer_name }},

This is a friendly reminder that your subscription for {{ subscription_name }} is due for renewal on {{ renewal_date }}.

To continue enjoying our services without interruption, please ensure your subscription is renewed before the due date.

If you have any questions or need assistance with the renewal process, feel free to contact us.

Thank you for being a valued customer of {{ company_name }}.

Best regards,
{{ company_name }}
{{ company_website }}

name: Service Completed Successfully
subject: Your Appointment #{{ appointment_number }} is Complete – We Value Your Feedback
required_fields: appointment_number, customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email, appointment_date, appointment_time, service_name, company_name, company_website
body:
Dear {{ customer_name }},

We’re pleased to inform you that your appointment #{{ appointment_number }} for {{ service_name }} on {{ appointment_date }} at {{ appointment_time }} has been successfully completed.

We hope you are satisfied with the service. Your feedback is very important to us and helps us improve.

Please take a moment to leave a review about your experience.

If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for choosing {{ company_name }}.

Best regards,
{{ company_name }}
{{ company_website }}

name: Appointment Reschedule Request

body:
Appointment Request Received

We’ve received your request and will confirm shortly

Hello {{ customer_name }},

We’ve successfully received your appointment request. Our team will review your request and confirm the schedule with you.

Requested Appointment Details:

Service: {{ service_name }}
Preferred Date: {{ appointment_date }}
Preferred Time: {{ appointment_time }}

One of our representatives will reach out to confirm or suggest a new schedule if needed.

Thank you for choosing {{ company_name }}. We’ll be in touch soon!

Best regards,
{{ company_name }}
{{ company_website }}

Service: {{ service_name }}
